payload.answer: The new memory appears to supersede the existing one: the existing memory says Sam currently works at Goldman, while the new memory says Sam left Goldman and joined Point72. Safe actions available: approve_supersession to accept the new memory as replacing the old current-employment fact; keep_both if both should remain because they may refer to different Sams, different time periods, or the wording is incomplete; reject_new if the new memory is incorrect or should not be saved; edit if you want to revise the wording before saving, such as clarifying dates, the specific Goldman entity, or which Sam is meant.
